title: Epic Fight - Dawn Day
description: This add-on for Epic Fight introduces new weapons with brand-new animations and much more!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DwzX4Imvy08" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Epic Fight Dawn Day

 **This Mod requires Epic Fight!**

### This mod adds the following things:


- Milady + Dual Moveset
- Light Greatswords + Dual Moveset
- Halberds
- Battlestaffs
- Sickles
- Knifes


  **Over 150 unique Animations**


Each weapon has its own moveset. Some weapons also have a dual moveset.

![Dual Milady](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7655d6b6052a7b9023d18e8921d6c4ce4e20da9_0.webp)

The idea behind the mod was to create weapons that aren't completely over-the-top with anime stuff, and instead are inspired by classic Souls Born games.

![Battlestaffs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1d2b3bcf51d0d22714605202f9091db1686bf433_0.webp)
